productName: Heavenly Buds - Bubble Hash - Apple Fritter DOH - 1g
description: Solventless hybrid bubble hash from Apple Fritter — ice-water washed and sifted through micron mesh bags to collect pristine, trichome-rich resin heads, no chemicals at all. Pure trichome craft, with notes of apple, butter, and cheese, leading into an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
